datasets.name: 7708da41
queryLines:
SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ReportName) AS Total_Unique_Reports,
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN IsSystemAccount = false THEN UserName_Clean
    END
  ) AS Total_Active_Users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT Entity) AS Total_Labs
FROM
  workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
WHERE
  ReportName IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean;

datasets.name: 822a3dec
queryLines:
SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ReportName) AS Unique_Reports,
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN IsSystemAccount = false THEN UserName_Clean
    END
  ) AS Active_Users
FROM
  workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
WHERE
  ReportName IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean
ORDER BY
  Total_Executions DESC;

datasets.name: a11d80dd
queryLines:
WITH report_totals AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT UserName_Clean) AS Unique_Users,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Duration_Sec
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ReportName, Month ORDER BY Total_Executions DESC) AS rnk
  FROM
    report_totals
),
top_reports AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Month,
    SUM(Total_Executions) AS Global_Executions
  FROM
    report_totals
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Month
),
top_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Month,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Month ORDER BY Global_Executions DESC) AS global_rank
  FROM
    top_reports
)
SELECT
  r.ReportName,
  r.Entity,
  r.Month,
  r.UserName_Clean,
  r.Total_Executions,
  r.Unique_Users,
  r.Avg_Duration_Sec,
  tr.global_rank
FROM
  ranked r
    INNER JOIN top_ranked tr
      ON r.ReportName = tr.ReportName
      AND r.Month = tr.Month
WHERE
  tr.global_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
  tr.Month,
  tr.global_rank,
  r.Total_Executions DESC;

datasets.name: 0193d42a
queryLines:
WITH user_agg AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    ReportName,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ReportName) AS Reports_Run
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    IsSystemAccount = false
    AND ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    ReportName
),
user_global AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    ReportName,
    Total_Executions,
    Reports_Run,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Month ORDER BY Total_Executions DESC) AS global_rnk
  FROM
    user_agg
)
SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  UserName_Clean,
  Domain,
  ReportName,
  Total_Executions,
  Reports_Run,
  global_rnk
FROM
  user_global
WHERE
  global_rnk <= 10
ORDER BY
  Month,
  global_rnk,
  Total_Executions DESC;

datasets.name: 016ea335
queryLines:
WITH perf_totals AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(MAX(Max_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Max_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(P95_Duration_Sec), 2) AS P95_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec), 2) AS Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Processing_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Rendering_Sec,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean
),
global_perf AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Month,
    AVG(P95_Duration_Sec) AS Global_P95
  FROM
    perf_totals
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Month
),
top_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Month,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Month ORDER BY Global_P95 DESC) AS global_rank
  FROM
    global_perf
)
SELECT
  p.ReportName,
  p.Entity,
  p.Month,
  p.UserName_Clean,
  p.Avg_Duration_Sec,
  p.Max_Duration_Sec,
  p.P95_Duration_Sec,
  p.Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
  p.Avg_Processing_Sec,
  p.Avg_Rendering_Sec,
  p.Total_Executions,
  tr.global_rank
FROM
  perf_totals p
    INNER JOIN top_ranked tr
      ON p.ReportName = tr.ReportName
      AND p.Month = tr.Month
WHERE
  tr.global_rank <= 15
ORDER BY
  tr.Month,
  tr.global_rank,
  p.P95_Duration_Sec DESC;

datasets.name: d24bf7ca
queryLines:
WITH vol_totals AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Row_Count), 0) AS Avg_Row_Count,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Byte_Count), 0) AS Avg_Byte_Count,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean
),
lab_vol AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    AVG(Avg_Byte_Count) AS Lab_Bytes
  FROM
    vol_totals
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Entity, Month ORDER BY Lab_Bytes DESC) AS lab_rank
  FROM
    lab_vol
)
SELECT
  v.ReportName,
  v.Entity,
  v.Month,
  v.UserName_Clean,
  v.Avg_Row_Count,
  v.Avg_Byte_Count,
  v.Total_Executions,
  r.lab_rank
FROM
  vol_totals v
    INNER JOIN ranked r
      ON v.ReportName = r.ReportName
      AND v.Entity = r.Entity
      AND v.Month = r.Month
WHERE
  r.lab_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
  v.Month,
  v.Entity,
  v.Avg_Byte_Count DESC;

datasets.name: 28636de3
queryLines:
SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  CASE
    WHEN IsSystemAccount = false THEN 'Human'
    ELSE 'System'
  END AS Account_Type,
  SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions
FROM
  workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
WHERE
  ReportName IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  IsSystemAccount
ORDER BY
  Month,
  Entity,
  IsSystemAccount;

datasets.name: eb81e97b
queryLines:
WITH duration_totals AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec), 2) AS Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Processing_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Rendering_Sec,
    ROUND(
      AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec) + AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec) + AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec),
      2
    ) AS Total_Avg_Duration
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean
),
lab_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Entity, Month ORDER BY AVG(Total_Avg_Duration) DESC) AS lab_rank
  FROM
    duration_totals
  GROUP BY
    ReportName,
    Entity,
    Month
)
SELECT
  d.ReportName,
  d.Entity,
  d.Month,
  d.UserName_Clean,
  'Data Retrieval' AS Metric,
  d.Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
  r.lab_rank
FROM
  duration_totals d
    INNER JOIN lab_ranked r
      ON d.ReportName = r.ReportName
      AND d.Entity = r.Entity
      AND d.Month = r.Month
WHERE
  r.lab_rank <= 10
UNION ALL
SELECT
  d.ReportName,
  d.Entity,
  d.Month,
  d.UserName_Clean,
  'Processing' AS Metric,
  d.Avg_Processing_Sec AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
  r.lab_rank
FROM
  duration_totals d
    INNER JOIN lab_ranked r
      ON d.ReportName = r.ReportName
      AND d.Entity = r.Entity
      AND d.Month = r.Month
WHERE
  r.lab_rank <= 10
UNION ALL
SELECT
  d.ReportName,
  d.Entity,
  d.Month,
  d.UserName_Clean,
  'Rendering' AS Metric,
  d.Avg_Rendering_Sec AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
  r.lab_rank
FROM
  duration_totals d
    INNER JOIN lab_ranked r
      ON d.ReportName = r.ReportName
      AND d.Entity = r.Entity
      AND d.Month = r.Month
WHERE
  r.lab_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
  Month,
  ReportName,
  Metric;

SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  Domain,
  CASE
    WHEN IsSystemAccount = false THEN 'Human'
    ELSE 'System'
  END AS Account_Type,
  SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Retrieval_Sec,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Processing_Sec,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Rendering_Sec,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_Row_Count), 0) AS Avg_Row_Count,
  ROUND(AVG(Avg_Byte_Count), 0) AS Avg_Byte_Count
FROM
  workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
WHERE
  ReportName IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Entity,
  Month,
  ReportName,
  UserName_Clean,
  Domain,
  IsSystemAccount
ORDER BY
  Month,
  Total_Executions DESC;

datasets.name: c99e8845
queryLines:
SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    UserName_Clean,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions)                               AS Total_Executions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT UserName_Clean)                           AS Unique_Users,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Duration_Sec),      2)                     AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec), 2)                     AS Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec),    2)                     AS Avg_Processing_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec),     2)                     AS Avg_Rendering_Sec
FROM workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
WHERE ReportName IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Entity, Month, ReportName, UserName_Clean
ORDER BY Entity, Total_Executions DESC;

datasets.name: 8828978c
queryLines:
WITH perf_totals AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    UserName_Clean,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(MAX(Max_Duration_Sec), 2) AS Max_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(P95_Duration_Sec), 2) AS P95_Duration_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec), 2) AS Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Processing_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Processing_Sec,
    ROUND(AVG(Avg_Rendering_Sec), 2) AS Avg_Rendering_Sec,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    UserName_Clean
),
lab_perf AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    AVG(P95_Duration_Sec) AS Lab_P95
  FROM
    perf_totals
  GROUP BY
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Entity, Month ORDER BY Lab_P95 DESC) AS lab_rank
  FROM
    lab_perf
)
SELECT
  p.Entity,
  p.Month,
  p.ReportName,
  p.UserName_Clean,
  p.Avg_Duration_Sec,
  p.Max_Duration_Sec,
  p.P95_Duration_Sec,
  p.Avg_DataRetrieval_Sec,
  p.Avg_Processing_Sec,
  p.Avg_Rendering_Sec,
  p.Total_Executions,
  r.lab_rank
FROM
  perf_totals p
    INNER JOIN ranked r
      ON p.ReportName = r.ReportName
      AND p.Entity = r.Entity
      AND p.Month = r.Month
WHERE
  r.lab_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
  p.Month,
  p.Entity,
  p.P95_Duration_Sec DESC;

datasets.name: 8329fcd5
queryLines:
WITH user_totals AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    SUM(Total_User_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ReportName) AS Reports_Run
  FROM
    workspace.gold.report_execution_summary
  WHERE
    IsSystemAccount = false
    AND ReportName IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    Entity,
    Month,
    ReportName,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain
),
user_by_lab AS (
  SELECT
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    ReportName,
    SUM(Total_Executions) AS Total_Executions,
    SUM(Reports_Run) AS Total_Reports_Run
  FROM
    user_totals
  GROUP BY
    Entity,
    Month,
    UserName_Clean,
    Domain,
    ReportName
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Entity, Month ORDER BY Total_Executions DESC) AS lab_rank
  FROM
    user_by_lab
)
SELECT
  Entity,
  Month,
  UserName_Clean,
  Domain,
  ReportName,
  Total_Executions,
  Total_Reports_Run,
  lab_rank
FROM
  ranked
WHERE
  lab_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
  Month,
  Entity,
  lab_rank,
  Total_Executions DESC;
